title: PhishGuard AI
summary: AI-assisted anti-phishing pipeline with mailbox scanning, evidence extraction, triage scoring, routing, and audit logging.

logs.title: Integrated mailbox scanning and AI triage flow
logs.details: Built a pipeline for reading mailbox messages, extracting phishing indicators, scoring risk, and routing messages into safe, review, or quarantine paths.

logs.title: Structured audit logging direction
logs.details: Defined the need for consistent JSONL audit records that capture sender, subject, score, decision, reasons, evidence, model usage, and routing outcome.

logs.title: GUI and backend schema alignment
logs.details: Working toward a cleaner shared schema between backend output, GUI display, logs, evidence panels, and manual .eml analysis behavior.

nextSteps: Document live mailbox versus manual analysis behavior
